case_title: NAMAKIAN, MAHMOUD "MACK" VS MURRY, MIKE DBA BLARNEY CONSTR.

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MURRY, MIKE DBA BLARNEY CONSTR.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $933.50 FILED BY NAMAKIAN, MAHMOUD "MACK" AS TO DEFENDANT MURRY, MIKE DBA BLARNEY CONSTR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
